narrative:
Mifflin Township has 653 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a clear Republican lean of 9.6 percentage points.
